caption: A web browser displays a digital causal loop diagram on a black background with a video call window in the upper right corner. The video call shows a man wearing a grey t-shirt and a black baseball cap. The diagram consists of various phrases connected by blue and red arrows, forming complex loops. Legible on-screen text includes phrases such as "Birds Outside," "Attractiveness of Garden," "Birds of Garden," "Bird Seed," "Buy Bird Seed," "Unsightly Goats," "Poop," "Robents," "Frustrations," and "Present Breakfast with." The browser tabs at the top include "Tool for Learning by Systemizing" and "Future of Society." Between the frames, the primary change is the man's head movement and facial expressions in the video call window, while the diagram remains static on the screen.
